title: Pizza Fuga con Queso and Classic Tomato Slice on Avenida Corrientes in Buenos Aires
description: Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires: A close-up, macro perspective captures the indulgent texture of authentic porteño-style pizza served along the historic Avenida Corrientes. The composition emphasizes a stark contrast between a vibrant red tomato slice and the iconic 'fuga con queso,' a thick, doughy base smothered in an abundance of melted cheese and caramelized slivers of onion. A solitary green olive rests atop the onion-laden crust, acting as a final garnish characteristic of local culinary tradition. The lighting is intimate and warm, highlighting the glistening oils and the charred edges of the white onions that provide a savory, pungent depth to the dish. Shallow depth of field blurs the background, directing the viewer’s focus entirely to the rich, caloric layers of dough and cheese that define Buenos Aires’ legendary pizzeria culture. Every detail, from the bubbling surface to the structural integrity of the crust, reflects the city's obsession with high-quality, comfort-driven fast food. This culinary exploration highlights how pizza has transcended its Italian roots to become a cornerstone of Argentine identity and urban life. By documenting these regional staples, the imagery preserves the sensory experience of a city where late-night dining is a fundamental pillar of social interaction. This image is a collaborative production by Samuel Jeffery and Audrey Bergner for Project 23.
